efxpt:issue.message: These HSIO GPIO must be placed at least 1 pair away from LVDS tmds_data2 in order to avoid noise coupling from GPIO to LVDS: GPIOB_N_30
These HSIO GPIO must be placed at least 1 pair away from MIPI Lane mipi_rx_dp01 in order to avoid noise coupling from GPIO to MIPI Lane: GPIOT_N_08,GPIOT_P_08
These HSIO GPIO must be placed at least 1 pair away from MIPI Lane mipi_tx_ck0 in order to avoid noise coupling from GPIO to MIPI Lane: GPIOT_N_22
These HSIO GPIO must be placed at least 1 pair away from MIPI Lane mipi_tx_dp12 in order to avoid noise coupling from GPIO to MIPI Lane: GPIOT_P_36
